title: Toy Shop Daily Close Checklist
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted toy shop daily close has the product safety, recall, warning-label, return, cash, and manager approval evidence needed before the store is marked closed.

sources.label: CPSC Recalls and Product Safety Warnings
CPSC Stop Online Sale of Recalled Products

evidence.title: Recall check log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record recall checks for new, returned, or questionable products before they are sold or returned to shelf.

evidence.title: Age and warning labels checked
evidence.recommendation: Confirm age grading, choking hazard, battery, magnet, and other warning labels are present and readable where applicable.

evidence.title: Damaged packaging log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record damaged packaging, missing labels, exposed batteries, broken parts, or opened returns before close.

evidence.title: Return and refund log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Review returns, refunds, exchanges, safety complaints, and customer notes before closing.

evidence.title: Safety complaint log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Escalate choking, battery, magnet, chemical, injury, or recall-related complaints to a manager.

evidence.title: Display and floor safety check completed
evidence.recommendation: Confirm displays, shelves, aisles, demo toys, cords, and loose parts are safe before close.

evidence.title: Cash drawer reconciliation completed
evidence.recommendation: Reconcile register totals, refunds, gift cards, discounts, and deposit before closing.

evidence.title: Restricted or high-risk stock secured
evidence.recommendation: Secure high-value items, small parts, batteries, magnets, demo electronics, and backroom stock.

approvals.title: Manager sign-off recorded
approvals.recommendation: A manager or owner must sign off before the agent marks the toy shop daily close complete.

thresholds.title: Cash variance exceeds toy shop threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate cash variance above $5 to a manager before closing.

thresholds.title: Safety complaint count requires manager review
thresholds.recommendation: Any toy safety complaint should be reviewed by a manager before close.

blockedActions.title: Toy shop daily close cannot be marked complete without manager sign-off
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to complete the toy shop daily close without the required manager approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Pause the close, request manager sign-off, then rerun the SOP check.

blockedActions.title: Recalled product sale is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to sell, list, or return a recalled product to shelf.
blockedActions.recommendation: Stop the sale, remove the product from inventory, and follow recall instructions.

blockedActions.title: Missing warning-label sale is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to sell a children's product with missing or unreadable safety labeling.
blockedActions.recommendation: Hold the product for manager review and supplier verification.

blockedActions.title: Close with open safety complaint is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to close while safety complaints still need manager review.
blockedActions.recommendation: Review and record the safety complaint disposition before closing.
